services.title: FairLensss
services.description: A photography & visual storytelling platform built for creatives. Clean layout, immersive galleries, and smooth interactions that put the images first.

services.title: Nebula Dashboard
services.description: A real-time analytics dashboard with WebGL-powered data visualizations and dark-mode-first design. Built for speed and clarity.

services.title: Arcane Studio
services.description: Portfolio platform for digital artists with immersive gallery views and smooth page transitions. Designed to make artwork shine.

services.title: Pulse Commerce
services.description: High-performance e-commerce storefront with 3D product previews and instant checkout. Conversion-optimized from the ground up.

games.title: Void Runner
games.description: A fast-paced endless runner set in a collapsing space station. Dodge debris, hack doors, and outrun the void before it consumes everything. Built in 72 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2024.

games.title: Neon Drift
games.description: A synthwave racing game with procedurally generated tracks and a killer lo-fi soundtrack. Drift through neon-lit canyons and climb the global leaderboard.

games.title: Echo Chamber
games.description: A puzzle platformer where you manipulate sound waves to reveal hidden platforms and solve environmental puzzles. Winner of the Indie Dev Showcase 2023.

art3d.title: Celestial Forge
art3d.description: A fantastical blacksmith's forge floating in space, with molten metal rivers and crystalline anvils. Rendered in Cycles with volumetric lighting.

art3d.title: Overgrown Terminal
art3d.description: An abandoned subway station reclaimed by nature, bioluminescent moss casting an eerie glow. 40M poly scene with hand-placed foliage.

art3d.title: Neon Pagoda
art3d.description: A cyberpunk-meets-traditional Japanese pagoda drenched in neon light and rain. Real-time render using Eevee with custom HDRI.

art3d.title: Crystal Cavern
art3d.description: Massive underground cave system with refractive crystal formations and volumetric fog. 6-hour render on a 4090.
